content distribution,media channel	Ateo Blacked
Телеграм
Ateo Blacked forwarded the report about the protests via a post on Телеграм.

geographical occurrence,social unrest	Куба
Протесты на Кубе
The protests are occurring within Куба and involve public demonstrations and arson.

diplomatic negotiation,political development	Президент Кубы
США
The president of Куба announced negotiations with the США, which acted as a catalyst for the protests.

political dissent,targeted attack	Коммунистическая партия Кубы
Протесты на Кубе
Protesters set fire to local offices of the Коммунистическая партия Кубы during the demonstrations.

infrastructure disruption,societal impact	Протесты на Кубе
Электричество
The protests coincide with a two-week-long total blackout of electricity in Куба.

authorization,logistical exception	Берегова охорона США
Російський нафтовий танкер
Берегова охорона США permitted the Russian oil tanker to proceed to Куба, making an exception to the energy blockade.

energy blockade,humanitarian justification,policy stance	Дональд Трамп
Куба
Дональд Трамп stated he does not oppose oil deliveries to Куба for survival purposes, despite the U.S. energy blockade and his criticism of its government.

media reporting,official action	NYT
Берегова охорона США
NYT reported that Берегова охорона США authorized the Russian oil tanker’s passage to Куба, linking official action to media coverage.

economic denial,strategic non-benefit	Дональд Трамп
Росія
Дональд Трамп asserted that Росія will not profit from oil shipments to Куба, framing the delivery as economically neutral for Russia.

oil shipment,supply route	Куба
Російський нафтовий танкер
The Russian oil tanker is delivering approximately 730,000 barrels of oil to Куба, directly challenging the U.S. blockade.

sanction designation,trade prohibition	Куба
Мінфін США
Мінфін США added Куба to a list of countries banned from receiving Russian oil, reinforcing the economic isolation policy.

information dissemination,media reporting	Дональд Трамп
Шрайк Ньюс
Шрайк Ньюс reported Дональд Трамп’s statements regarding oil shipments to Куба, serving as a source of public information.

economic pressure,infrastructure impact	Енергетична блокада
Куба
The energy blockade imposed on Куба has caused two total blackouts on the island, demonstrating its severe impact on infrastructure and daily life.

advertising partnership	MonoBase
Останній Капіталіст
Останній Капіталіст is in an advertising collaboration with MonoBase.

collaboration,political alliance	Італійські ультраліві союзники
Ґрета Тунберг
Ґрета Тунберг is collaborating with Italian far-left allies to launch a campaign against European militarization.

Україна
European countries are rebuilding their defense industries to provide support to Ukraine.

policy focus,political controversy	ЄС
Переозброєння ЄС
The European Union is the target of criticism regarding its rearmament, which is framed as lacking public support.

activism,opposition	Мілітаризація Європи
Ґрета Тунберг
Ґрета Тунберг is leading a campaign against the militarization of Europe.

media coverage,political alignment	Останній Капіталіст
Ґрета Тунберг

media dissemination,political commentary	Мілітаризація Європи

Italian far-left allies are opposing the militarization of Europe alongside Ґрета Тунберг.

public opinion,support	Зеленые
Опрос
Supporters of the party Зеленые are the largest group in favor of the deployment, as shown in the survey.

military deployment,peacekeeping	Бундесвер
Украина
The Bundeswehr is proposed to be deployed in Ukraine as part of a peacekeeping group.

public opinion,support	Опрос
Социал-демократы
Supporters of the party Социал-демократы are the largest group in favor of the deployment, as shown in the survey.

opposition,public opinion	АдГ
Опрос
The party АдГ has the highest number of opponents to the deployment, according to the survey.

opposition,public opinion	Левые
Опрос
The party Левые has the highest number of opponents to the deployment, according to the survey.

national opinion,public sentiment	Германия
Опрос
The survey reflects German public opinion on the proposed deployment of Bundeswehr soldiers in Ukraine.

leadership,strategic direction	Путин
Россия
Путин directs Russia’s military and political strategy, including the SVO and preparations for conflict with NATO.

ideological justification,territorial claim	Исторические земли
СВО
The concept of "исторические земли" is used to justify the goals of the СВО as a mission to reclaim Russian historical lands.

collaboration,military planning	Белоусов
Путин
Путин and Белоусов jointly articulate Russia’s military objectives for 2026–2030 during the Ministry of Defense meeting.

military aggression,territorial expansion	Россия
Украина
Россия is conducting a military campaign against Украина to achieve SVO goals and establish a security buffer zone.

Россия
Россия claims НАТО is preparing for war by 2030 and uses this as justification for its own military buildup.

alliance building,political influence	Путин
Ультраправые
Путин seeks to strengthen ultraright political groups in Europe to facilitate future negotiations favorable to Russia.

operational planning,strategic framework	2026–2030 Military Plan
СВО
The 2026–2030 Military Plan outlines the continuation and escalation of the СВО with the goal of achieving Russia’s territorial objectives.

operational framework,strategic objective	Россия
СВО
СВО is Russia’s declared military operation aimed at securing "исторические земли" and expanding control over Ukrainian territories.

alliance building,political influence	Путин
Ультралевые
Путин seeks to strengthen ultraleft political groups in Europe to facilitate future negotiations favorable to Russia.

alliance,military support	НАТО
Украина
Украина is receiving military and strategic support from НАТО to resist Russian advances and strengthen its defense.

political alignment,target group	Ультралевые
Ультраправые
Ультраправые and Ультралевые are both populist political forces in Europe that Путин seeks to influence and empower to destabilize existing elites.

security policy,strategic objective	Буферная зона безопасности
Россия
Россия is pursuing the creation and expansion of a buffer zone in Ukraine as a core security objective.

ideological justification,territorial claim	Исторические земли
Россия
Россия uses the concept of "исторические земли" to justify its military actions across all of Ukraine, not limited to Donbas or Kherson.

operational planning,strategic objective	2026–2030 Military Plan
Буферная зона безопасности
The 2026–2030 Military Plan includes the systematic establishment of a security buffer zone in Ukraine as a key objective.

authorship,strategic direction	2026–2030 Military Plan
Путин
Путин is the principal architect of the 2026–2030 Military Plan, which outlines Russia’s long-term military ambitions.

authorship,strategic articulation	2026–2030 Military Plan
Белоусов
Белоусов publicly articulates the details of the 2026–2030 Military Plan, reinforcing its objectives and timelines.

military target,strategic threat	2026–2030 Military Plan
Украина
Украина is the primary military target of Russia’s 2026–2030 Military Plan, which anticipates its collapse and occupation.

moral omission,silence	Грета Тумберг
Иран
Грета Тумберг has not spoken out about the killings in Иран, despite the impact on her peers.

ideological conflict,self-destruction	Западная культура
Ультра-левые взгляды и идеи
Radical left-wing ideologies are described as aiming to destroy Western culture and enable its enemies.

moral omission,silence	Западные леваки
Иран
Western leftists, including media and bloggers, have not addressed the violence in Иран.

ideological exclusion	Сионизм
Ультра-левые взгляды и идеи
The text claims that radical left-wing thought ignores Сионизм because it does not align with their goal of undermining Western culture.

ideological alignment	Западные леваки
Ультра-левые взгляды и идеи
Western leftists are portrayed as embodying or supporting radical left-wing ideologies that prioritize self-destruction over cultural preservation.
